label: near_miss

case_target.description: 当前 case 的主控制对象是 isSafeUrl()，它负责执行协议、域名与地址范围校验。

should_not_report.reason: The URL is validated by isSafeUrl() before RestTemplate.getForObject() is called. The guard enforces https-only scheme, domain allowlist, and IP-range blocking. A custom RestTemplate factory disables redirect following to prevent 3xx-based bypass.
should_not_report.false_positive_risk: A system matching '@RequestParam → RestTemplate.getForObject()' without tracing into isSafeUrl() will incorrectly flag getForObject() at line 67 as a High-severity SSRF sink.

controls.description: Scheme allowlist: only 'https' is permitted, blocking http://, file://, gopher://, dict:// and other dangerous schemes.
Domain allowlist: only api.example.com and cdn.example.com are permitted, blocking arbitrary external or internal hostnames.
IP-range blocklist: if the hostname resolves to an IP address, loopback (127.x), site-local (10.x, 192.168.x, 172.16-31.x), and link-local (169.254.x) ranges are rejected.
setInstanceFollowRedirects(false) prevents the HTTP client from following 3xx redirects that could redirect to an internal host after passing the initial URL validation.

notes: DNS rebinding is a theoretical residual risk not modeled here. For static analysis evaluation this case is labeled near_miss/safe.
